metadata.description: Loops with hands: outbound agentic feedback loops on Telegram. Hear real testers and your launch audience, ship the fix, return the new version — all in your own agent, on your own machine.

plugins.name: loops
plugins.description: Telegram feedback loops (tg-contacts-feedback, tg-comments-feedback) + a setup skill, on a shared userbot/transcribe/inbox spine. Skills install namespaced as loops:<name>.
